name: extract-json
description: Extract values from JSON files using dot-separated key paths, pick subset of keys, search matching keys/values, or list keys, replacing cat | python3 -c json.load chains.

parameters.name: --pick
parameters.description: Comma-separated top-level keys to extract as subset, e.g. --pick=scripts,jest

parameters.name: --raw
parameters.description: Print raw string without JSON quoting

parameters.name: --search
parameters.description: Find keys/values containing string at any depth

examples.expected: JSON subset with only scripts and jest keys

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cat + python3 -c import sys,json; json.load(sys.stdin) chains into one step; --pick collapses cat + python subset dict comprehension into one step.
